buildCommand: pnpm --filter @lucent/docs build && if [ -d docs/dist ]; then rm -rf dist && cp -R docs/dist dist; elif [ -d dist ]; then true; else echo "Docs build output not found" >&2; exit 1; fi
ignoreCommand: git rev-parse --verify HEAD^ >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 1; git diff HEAD^ HEAD --quiet -- docs/ scripts/docgen.ts scripts/gen-script-types.ts scripts/ts-ast-utils.ts app/src/renderer/windows/game/ app/src/shared/ packages/game/src/ packages/collection/src/
